    Joonhyung Lee

    Hello everyone! I am a master’s student in the A.I. department at Korea University, where I am advised by Sungjoon Choi. My research is at the intersection of robotics and machine learning.

    [study] Task and Motion Planning

    0. What is Task and Motion Planning?

    • Task planning: High-level, Discrete (i.e., pick, place, grasp, sweep, push etc.)
    • Motion planning: Low-level, Continuous (i.e., trajectory generation, interpolation, collision avoidance etc.)

    Task And Motion Planning (TAMP) problems contain elements of discrete task planning, discrete-continuous mathematical programming, and continuous motion planning. 즉, Discrete Task planning $\leftarrow$ Mode parameter $\rightarrow$ Motion planning 로 이루어진다.

    1. Integrated TAMP

    Reference

    • Hierarchical Task and Motion Planning in the Now (2011, ICRA) Paper
    • Integrated Task and Motion Planning (2021, Annual Review) Paper

    Tags: ITMP
